about: Echo Exchange - anonymous community sentences: something your ideal self told you that helped. Contribute via pull request; see CONTRIBUTING.md. Attribution lives in git history, never in the sentence.
sentences: You don't have to feel ready. You only have to stay.
The day you survived is still a day you won.
You are not behind. You are on your own clock, and it is the right time.
Rest is not the opposite of progress. It is part of it.
You came back. After everything, you came back. That is the whole story.
Small is not nothing. Small is how everything real gets built.
Be as patient with yourself as you would be with someone you love.
